ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fishing_trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fishing trip */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the fishing trip */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the trip occurred */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season in which the trip occurred (e.g., 1 for spring) */,
  "water_body_type" INTEGER /* Type of water body where the trip occurred (e.g., estuary, river) */,
  "number_of_trips" INTEGER /* Number of trips made during the specified duration */,
  "location" TEXT /* The specific location of the fishing trip (e.g., coordinates, region) */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the boat used for the trip (if applicable) */,
  "permit_number" TEXT /* The permit number required for the fishing trip */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* The license number of the fisherman */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* The start time of the fishing trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* The end time of the fishing trip */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_trips_water_body_type FOREIGN KEY ("water_body_type") REFERENCES water_bodies ("water_body_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_trips_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_trips_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which fishing trips occurred */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the year is a leap year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Spring, Summer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_bodies" (
  "water_body_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of water body */,
  "water_body_type" TEXT /* Type of water body (e.g., estuary, river) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the water body */,
  "area" REAL /* The area of the water body in square kilometers */,
  "depth" REAL /* The average depth of the water body in meters */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location of the water body (e.g., coordinates, region) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing trip */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., fisherman, guide) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* The contact number of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the participant */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* The license number of the participant */,
  "is_licensed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the participant is licensed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_participants_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES fishing_trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing trip during which the equipment was used */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of fishing equipment (e.g., rod, reel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "brand" TEXT /* The brand of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* The model of the equipment */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* The date the equipment was purchased */,
  "condition" TEXT /* The condition of the equipment (e.g., new, used) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_equipment_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES fishing_trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catch_records" (
  "catch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catch record */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing trip */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of fish caught */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of fish caught */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the catch in kilograms */,
  "length" REAL /* The average length of the fish caught in centimeters */,
  "method" TEXT /* The method used to catch the fish (e.g., net, line) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the catch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catch_records_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES fishing_trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of environmental conditions */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing trip */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  "water_temperature" REAL /* Water temperature during the trip */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environmental conditions */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* The wind speed during the trip in kilometers per hour */,
  "humidity" REAL /* The humidity during the trip in percentage */,
  "visibility" REAL /* The visibility during the trip in kilometers */,
  "barometric_pressure" REAL /* The barometric pressure during the trip in millibars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES fishing_trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fishing regulation */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing trip */,
  "restriction" TEXT /* Type of restriction (e.g., size limit, catch limit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date the regulation became effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* The date the regulation expires */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* The legal reference for the regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulations_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES fishing_trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* A hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing trip data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" REAL /* The duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_access_logs_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES fishing_trips ("trip_id")
)
